_comment: Indoor Asthma Trigger — Audio Monitor Config. Copy to config.json and fill in values.
_voting_comment: Voting reduces false positives from mic noise / brief sounds.
A detection only feeds the episode tracker after `min_votes` hits
of the same canonical label (cough/sneeze/wheeze) accumulate within
`vote_window_s` seconds. Adjacent labels (breathing, gasp, etc.) still
contribute to classifier debug output but do not open episodes on their own.
Lower min_votes (e.g. 1) to make detection more sensitive; raise it for
